step_rationale: PI3K/AKT signaling protein; systemic metabolic/survival marker but not directly involved in atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: CRTAC1 is associated with cellular survival signaling and systemic metabolic response in acute myocardial infarction.

references.title: Identification of Cardiometabolic Protein Biomarkers for Acute Myocardial Infarction Using Olink Proteomics.
